items.user_turn: Following up on that Andalusia route (Seville → Ronda → Granada), please produce a detailed day-by-day 10-day self-drive itinerary that minimizes driving time: list each driving segment with realistic drive durations, recommend sights with timed visit windows, and suggest 2–3 accommodation options per stop by budget. Also include parking and accessibility notes and make sure the plan fits my flight and rental-car schedule and my companion's mobility limits. For scheduling: arrival is Iberia IB3160 into Seville (SVQ) at 09:35 local; departure is British Airways BA842 from Granada (GRX) to London Heathrow at 11:15 local. Rental car is Europcar booking EC-452789 — pickup at Seville Airport (SVQ) at 10:30, drop-off at Granada Airport (GRX) at 12:30. Budget for accommodations and paid activities is €1,800 total for 2 people (about €90/person/day). My companion uses a cane, struggles with long staircases and uneven cobbles, prefers ground-floor or elevator-access rooms, and walking segments ≤500 m when possible; please prioritize that in accommodation and route choices. We prefer a moderate pace with about 2–3 attractions per day, and our main interests are flamenco performances and local food experiences.

items.user_turn: I want a practical sunrise-shooting plan from my Santorini caldera waypoints: compute precise timing for sunrise, blue hour, and golden hour at each coordinate; include transport, parking, and access notes plus safe alternatives if a viewpoint is blocked; and give a gear and battery checklist and a short morning itinerary. I can share the GPX export or waypoint list and orientation notes (for example, 'face NW to include Fira'). My lodging and departure details are Blue Caldera Guesthouse, Finikia, Oia, 84702 Santorini (host Maria Papadopoulos, +30 22860 28123, maria@bluecaldera.gr). I need to be checked out and at the port/airport transfer by 10:30 to make my return flight from Santorini (JTR) to Athens. I have mild right-knee osteoarthritis — I can handle short rocky descents (~10–15 minutes) but not long steep climbs, and prefer pack weight ≤12 kg, so please prioritize waypoints accordingly.

items.user_turn: Please turn my mapped Lyon food weekend into a finalized, time-optimized itinerary—minute-by-minute or block schedule—that sequences the three bistro reservations and the guided market tour, adds walking and tram/taxi directions with backups, confirms realistic timing buffers, and adjusts for my hotel location, dietary restrictions, budget, and mobility so I can share reservations with my travel companion. Total budget for meals and transport is €300 for two people. I have plantar fasciitis and prefer walks under 15 minutes between stops and need occasional seating. Group size is 2 adults and the contact phone for reservations is +33 6 78 45 12 90.
